Bash(node -e "import\('./scripts/collect.mjs'\).catch\(e => { if\(e.message.includes\('--account'\)\) { console.log\('✓ CLI loads correctly \(exits with usage error as expected\)'\); process.exit\(0\); } else { console.error\('✗ Unexpected error:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); } }\)")
